factors.data_availability: medium — 1,543 total specimens across 9 orgs but histotype annotation sparse
factors.org_discoverability: medium — mix of commercial suppliers and academic TCGA-UCEC cohort
factors.biomarker_specificity: high — FIGO staging and histotype (endometrioid vs serous vs clear cell) required; annotation rate low in commercial biobanks

expected_failure_modes: Histotype annotation (endometrioid vs serous vs clear cell) is sparse in commercial biobanks — pipeline may overcount eligible specimens
FIGO staging vs TNM staging mismatch: 83% TNM staged but FIGO conversion not systematically documented — pipeline may conflate the two
Matched plasma availability is variable across orgs — only ProteoGenex and BIOMEDICA CRO have confirmed matched pairs
POLE mutation and MMR status (required for TCGA-like molecular subtyping) are effectively unavailable in commercial collections
May find valid academic sources (TCGA-UCEC, PORTEC trial cohorts) not in AminoChain — these are correct finds
